Beetlejuice Beetlejuice (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $294,100,435Details
International Box Office $157,879,613
Worldwide Box Office $451,980,048
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,269,368
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,514,258
Total $6,783,626
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia’s life is turned upside down when her rebellious teenage daughter, Astrid, discovers the mysterious model of the town in the attic and the portal to the Afterlife is accidentally opened. With trouble brewing in both realms, it’s only a matter of time until someone says Beetlejuice’s name three times and the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$111,003,345 (37.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.65 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:65.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$100,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,575 opening theaters/4,575 max. theaters, 7.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $311,002,757

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 6th, 2024 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
September 6th, 2024 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: September 4th, 2024 (Wide), released as Beetlejuice Beetlejuice (비틀쥬스 비틀쥬스) (South Korea)
September 5th, 2024 (Wide) (Netherlands)
September 5th, 2024 (Wide) (Slovakia)
September 5th, 2024 (Wide) (Argentina)
September 5th, 2024 (Wide) (Czech Republic)
Video Release: October 8th, 2024 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violent content, macabre and bloody images, strong language, some suggestive material and brief drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2843 (cert #54915), 7/17/2024)
Running Time: 144 minutes
Franchise: Beetlejuice
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel, Sequels Without Their Original Stars
Filming location (country): England, United Kingdom
Filming location (state or county): Hertfordshire, England, Massachusetts, United States, Vermont, United States
Plot point: Haunting

Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia’s life is turned upside down when her rebellious teenage daughter, Astrid, discovers the mysterious model of the town in the attic and the portal to the Afterlife is accidentally opened. With trouble brewing in both realms, it’s only a matter of time until someone says Beetlejuice’s name three times and the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.
